concerns.text: FR-015 mandates a KS test comparing baseline metrics (GMM/ARIMA) against DP-GMM signatures. However, User Story 2 (the primary verification vehicle for baseline comparisons) only describes KS tests for DP-GMM signatures vs. normal windows (Scenario 4) and t-tests for time-to-detection. The specific procedure to perform the KS test on the *baseline* metrics as required by FR-015 is missing from the User Story acceptance scenarios, creating a verification gap.
